name: thesis
description: ``` ├── client/ │   ├── binariesWeb/                # .js and .wasm files compiled from the c++ protocol with emscripten (for Web) │   ├── binaries/                   # .js and .wasm files compiled from the c++ protocol with emscripten (for Node.js) │   ├── public/                     # Javascript, CSS and HTML │   ├── app.js                      # Node.js client app (starting point) with the HTTP requests │   ├── simulateClients.js          # Simulation with 5 clients │   └── simulateNClients.js         # Simulation with a variable number of clients │ ├── protocol/ │   └── src/  │       ├── modules/                # Folder with the protocol modules (create_user, create_group, ...) │       └── protocol_run.cpp        # File with the protocol │ └── server/ │   └── src/ │       └── main/ │           ├── binaries/           # C++ binaries generated from the protocol │           ├── java/ │           │   └── com.example/    # Java classes with the servlet code (actual server logic) │           ├── test/               # JUnit tests for the servlets │           └── webapp/             # Required files for Tomcat deployment └── README.md ```
